content.problemStatement: Given $N$ words, count the number of unique words.
constraints:
- $1 \leq N \leq 100000$
- All words consist of lower/upper case latin letters and their length don't exceed 10.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input contains an integer $N$ — the number of words. 
- The second line of input contains $N$ space separated strings - the words.
content.outputFormat: - Output on a single line, the number of unique words.

sampleTestCases.explanation: There are only 3 unique words: Good, Bad, Best
